title: lotus herbaceus subsp. gracilis
intro: Lotus herbaceus subsp. gracilis, commonly known as the blue lotus or water lily, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to have anxiolytic and sedative effects. The health benefits of Lotus herbaceus subsp. gracilis include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential psychoactive effects and interactions with other medications.
